title: Implement Bull/Bear/Neutral debate mechanism with Fund Manager decision
acceptance_criteria: Bull Analyst agent - argues long/buy case with confluence factors
Bear Analyst agent - argues short/sell case with counter-signals
Neutral/Risk Analyst - stress-tests both cases, evaluates risk
Fund Manager - synthesizes all cases, produces final decision with 0-100 confidence
Minimum confluence: 3 of 6 departments must support
Confidence threshold: >=65 for entry, >=80 for full position
